DOWNFALLU-GIFT.description: When you obtain this card, get a card reward with the following card type.
DOWNFALLU-GIFT.title: Gift
DOWNFALLU-MUDDLE.description: Muddling a card changes its energy cost this turn to between [blue]0[/blue] and [blue]3[/blue] at random.
DOWNFALLU-MUDDLE.title: Muddle
DOWNFALLU-OFFCLASS.description: An Offclass card is any obtainable card from a class other than your own (including [gold]Colorless cards[/gold], [gold]Curses[/gold], and [gold]Statuses[/gold]).
DOWNFALLU-OFFCLASS.title: Offclass
DOWNFALLU-OVERFLOW.description: Overflow effects activate if you have more than [blue]5[/blue] cards in [Hand].
DOWNFALLU-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
